Name: GraphicsConfig_VolumetricEffectQuality_win64
Description: Determines the parameters of each volumetric particle quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Volumetric Fog Shadows
Fields.Description: If ON, enable volumetric fog shadows.

Fields.Name: Fog Edge Correction Level
Fields.Description: The fog edge correction level used during bilateral upscaling.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume Resolution
Fields.Description: The processing resolution of placeable fog volumes. (Overrides upscale type setting).

Fields.Name: Fog Shadow Sample Count Offset
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the fog shadow sample count.

Fields.Name: Fog: Local Light Distance Scale
Fields.Description: The local light calculation distance scale within volumetric fog (0 does not calculate local light).

Fields.Name: Fog Volume Depth Scaler
Fields.Description: The depth scalar to apply to volumetric fog.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume Depth Divisor
Fields.Description: The depth divisor to apply to volumetric fog.

Fields.Name: Enable Placeable Fog Volumes
Fields.Description: If ON, placeable fog volumes are enabled.

Fields.Name: Fog Upscaling
Fields.Description: The type of upscaling to apply to the fog.

Fields.Name: 2-Step Upscaling
Fields.Description: Upscaling from the reduced buffer will be increased from 1 to 2 stages to reduce flickering.

Fields.Name: Enable Fog Volume Shadow
Fields.Description: If ON, enables shadows related to the fog volume.

Fields.Name: Fog Volume Ray Sample Count Offset
Fields.Description: The offset applied to the sampling number during ray marching for the fog volume.

Fields.Name: Enable 2-Step Upscaling
Fields.Description: If ON, use 2-step upscaling when applying upscaling to the fog volume.

Fields.Name: Force Fog Volume Shadowing
Fields.Description: If ON, forcibly casts a shadow on the area regardless of the setting when shadow is permitted (shadow processing is not affected)
